popularStory.headline: Leven
popularStory.description: EDWARD or EDMUND BLOUNT of Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, England, was born about 1406 to John Blount (c1377-1444) and Willelma or Alicia Abarle (c1392-1454.) He married Margaret Seymour about 1449 of …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Blount於1428年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾曼古特斯費爾德時，他的父親John Blount III44歲，母親Alice Alicia Maud Bere34歲。他與Margaret Seymour結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1468年4月10日在英國格盧斯特斯爾比頓享年40歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾曼古特斯費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Blount于1428年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾曼古特斯費爾德时，他的父亲John Blount III44岁，母亲Alice Alicia Maud Bere34岁。他与Margaret Seymour结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1468年4月10日在英国格盧斯特斯爾比頓享年40岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾曼古特斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Blount was born in 1428, in Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, England, his father, John Blount III, was 44 and his mother, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, was 34. He married Margaret Seymour. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 10 April 1468, in Bitton, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Blount est né en 1428, à Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Blount III, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Seymour. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 10 avril 1468, à Bitton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Blount 1428 in Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Blount III 44 und seine Mutter Alice Alicia Maud Bere 34. Er hat Margaret Seymour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 10. April 1468 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Bitton, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Blount è nato il nel 1428 nel Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, John Blount III, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Seymour. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 10 aprile 1468, nel Bitton, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Blountが1428年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアマンゴトスフィールドで生まれた時，父John Blount IIIは44歳，母Alice Alicia Maud Bereは34歳であった。Margaret Seymourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1468年4月10日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアビットオンで40歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアマンゴトスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Blount(이)가 1428년 영국 그루스스터실르 만고츠필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Blount III(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Alicia Maud Bere(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Margaret Seymour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1468년 4월 10일 영국 그루스스터실르 비턴에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 만고츠필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Blount nasceu em 1428, em Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Blount III, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Seymour. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de abril de 1468, em Bitton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Blount родился в 1428 г. в местности мангоцфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Blount III было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Alicia Maud Bere, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Seymour. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 10 апреля 1468 г. в местности биттон, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности мангоцфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Blount nació en 1428, en Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Blount III, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Margaret Seymour. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 10 de abril de 1468, en Bitton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Mangotsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
